task_completion.description: Verify that the Fixed Assets module has been enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the left navigation menu in Manager.io. The 'Fixed Assets' tab must be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the supplier 'TechWorld' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Suppliers list screen or the supplier dropdown in a Purchase Invoice. The name 'TechWorld' must be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the fixed asset 'MacBook Pro' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Fixed Assets list screen or the item dropdown in a Purchase Invoice. The asset name 'MacBook Pro' must be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that a purchase invoice was created for the correct supplier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Purchase Invoices screen or the invoice view/edit screen. There must be an invoice associated with the supplier 'TechWorld'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the purchase invoice line item is allocated to the correct account and asset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the line items on the purchase invoice. The account column must show 'Fixed assets' and the item/asset selected must be 'MacBook Pro'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the purchase invoice has the correct unit price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the line items on the purchase invoice. The unit price or total amount for the MacBook Pro must be exactly 2500.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Manager.io web interface being navigated and forms being filled out, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match Manager.io's standard layout, menus, and styling. It should not be a plain text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify that the data was entered legitimately and not spoofed via browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer console open, and the data should appear properly formatted within the standard Manager.io input fields and tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires verifying the following specific values in Manager.io: 1) Asset Name: 'MacBook Pro', 2) Supplier Name: 'TechWorld', 3) Purchase Amount: 2500.00, 4) Account: 'Fixed assets'.
